title: 信息日报 2026-07-24

headline.title: 美股下跌，科技股抛售蔓延，油价逼近100美元：市场综述
headline.summary: 由于对人工智能巨额投资回报的怀疑与油价飙升重新点燃通胀担忧，美股和债券周四下跌。科技板块领跌，市场避险情绪浓厚。布伦特原油突破100美元，为5月以来首次。
headline.title_en: Stocks Fall as Tech Selloff Extends, Oil Near $100: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: Stocks and bonds fell as doubts over returns from billions of dollars spent on artificial intelligence coincided with a surge in oil prices that rekindled inflation concerns. Tech shares led declines, with Brent crude topping $100 for the first time since May.
headline.original_title: Stocks Fall as Tech Selloff Extends, Oil Near $100: Markets Wrap
headline.reason: 该报道同时涵盖了AI投资情绪转折、地缘政治风险（油价）和市场波动三大核心主题，对全球投资者具有广泛参考价值，是今日最需要优先阅读的头条新闻。
headline.reason_en: This story captures three critical themes: shifting sentiment on AI investment, geopolitical risk through oil prices, and market volatility, making it the most important read for global investors today.
